overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring Night City's neon-lit downtown district at night. The character walks along wet streets reflecting colorful holographic advertisements, passes through a plaza with a purple-lit bar, and continues under elevated highways with futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with holographic billboards

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath massive glowing digital billboards

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying animated advertisement with smiling face
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights
tall modern street light with glowing elements
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide wet sidewalk in a futuristic downtown district, passing beneath massive glowing digital billboards displaying advertisements. The neon-lit environment reflects off the rain-slicked concrete as sparse pedestrians move through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with outdoor cafe seating and vending machines

events.description: moves from open sidewalk into semi-covered plaza area with outdoor seating

agents.ego_description: character walking through plaza area approaching outdoor seating and vending machines

entered.detail: large white umbrellas shading outdoor seating area
brightly lit red and blue vending machine with advertisements

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered plaza area featuring outdoor cafe seating with large umbrellas and bright vending machines. The space is more enclosed than the open street, with a pedestrian visible smoking near a pole on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate neon-lit bar with purple lighting and Japanese decor

events.description: enters narrow bar area with distinctive purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: character approaches the bar counter, examining the purple neon interior and Japanese-style lanterns

entered.detail: long counter bathed in vibrant purple neon light with stools
traditional Japanese-style paper lanterns with black characters hanging above bar
blue cushioned stools lined up along the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow bar bathed in vibrant purple neon light, featuring a counter with blue stools and traditional Japanese paper lanterns hanging above. The enclosed space contrasts sharply with the open plaza outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with ventilation grates and towering overpasses

events.description: exits the purple bar back to the street level
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and overpasses above

agents.ego_description: character exits the bar and looks up at the massive architecture and neon signs overhead, taking in the vertical cityscape

entered.detail: large metal grate on the ground with geometric pattern
massive concrete highway structure running above the street level
vertical green neon sign with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bar, the character emerges to a view of massive concrete overpasses and ventilation structures. The camera tilts upward to reveal towering glass skyscrapers adorned with neon advertisements against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street beneath elevated highway with active traffic

events.description: begins walking along the street under the elevated highway overpass
futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet street, headlights streaking in the darkness

agents.ego_description: character walks along the street beneath the overpass, observing the traffic and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with glowing headlights driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: dark asphalt street glistening with rain reflections and yellow lane markings
stream of futuristic cars with headlight trails moving along the road
large yellow billboard with black warning text

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city street beneath an elevated highway, with futuristic vehicles passing by and neon signs illuminating the buildings. The scene captures the bustling cyberpunk atmosphere of the downtown district at night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched downtown district that shifts from wide, rain-slicked streets into intimate interior spaces before opening up to a towering urban canyon. It begins on a wide wet sidewalk beneath massive glowing digital billboards, where the vibrant lights reflect off the concrete as the character moves past sparse pedestrians. As the path narrows, the scene transitions into a semi-covered plaza with outdoor cafe seating and bright vending machines before moving further inward into a small bar bathed in deep purple neon and adorned with Japanese paper lanterns. The camera then emerges from the enclosed bar to reveal a stark contrast of massive concrete overpasses and ventilation structures, tilting upward toward glass skyscrapers that pierce the night sky. Finally, the movement settles back onto the wet city street beneath an elevated highway, passing futuristic vehicles and flickering neon signs that define the bustling cyberpunk atmosphere.
